semantic.role: Project overview and architecture demonstration document
responsibilities: Describing the purpose and scope of the archspine-demo project
Explaining key architectural highlights including DDD separation and boundary enforcement
Demonstrating local control plane usage via .spine/ directory

English.purpose: This document provides a high-level overview of the archspine-demo project, which serves as a minimal demonstration of the ArchSpine protocol. It explains the project's architectural philosophy and key design decisions.
English.context_and_audience: The intended audience includes developers and architects who want to understand how ArchSpine enforces architectural boundaries in a real project. It is also useful for anyone evaluating the ArchSpine protocol for their own projects.
key_takeaways: The project demonstrates Domain-Driven Design by separating domain logic from infrastructure.
Deliberate architectural violations are included to showcase ArchSpine's rule-checking capabilities.
The .spine/ directory stores semantic context locally, acting as a local control plane.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档提供 archspine-demo 项目的高层概述，该项目是 ArchSpine 协议的一个极简演示。它解释了项目的架构理念和关键设计决策。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 目标读者包括希望了解 ArchSpine 如何在真实项目中强制执行架构边界的开发者和架构师。本文档也适用于任何正在评估 ArchSpine 协议是否适合自己的项目的人。
key_takeaways: 该项目通过将领域逻辑与基础设施分离，展示了领域驱动设计。
项目中包含了故意的架构违规，用以展示 ArchSpine 的规则检查能力。
.spine/ 目录在本地存储语义上下文，充当本地控制面的角色。
